---
name: Specification Change Proposal
about: Propose a formal change to the normative specification
title: "[SPEC] "
labels: spec-change
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-paragraph description of the proposed specification change.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? Include references to implementation experience, regulatory requirements, or community feedback.

## Specification Changes

### Files Modified

List all specification files that would be modified:
- [ ] `spec/core.md`
- [ ] `spec/actor-model.md`
- [ ] `spec/tool-contracts.md`
- [ ] `spec/security.md`
- [ ] `spec/privacy.md`
- [ ] `spec/provenance.md`
- [ ] `spec/audit.md`
- [ ] `spec/conformance.md`
- [ ] `spec/versioning.md`
- [ ] `regulatory/US_FDA.md`
- [ ] `regulatory/HIPAA.md`
- [ ] `regulatory/CFR_PART_11.md`
- [ ] `regulatory/IRB_SITE_POLICY_TEMPLATE.md`
- [ ] Other: ___

### Proposed Text

Provide the exact normative text changes using RFC 2119 keywords (MUST, SHOULD, MAY).

## Conformance Impact

| Level | Impact |
|-------|--------|
| 1 - Core | None / New requirement / Modified requirement |
| 2 - Clinical Read | None / New requirement / Modified requirement |
| 3 - Imaging | None / New requirement / Modified requirement |
| 4 - Federated Site | None / New requirement / Modified requirement |
| 5 - Robot Procedure | None / New requirement / Modified requirement |

## Backward Compatibility

- **Is this backward-compatible?** Yes / No
- **If no, what breaks?**
- **Migration path for existing implementations:**

## Implementation Impact

Estimated effort for existing conforming implementations to adopt this change.

## Regulatory Impact

- [ ] No regulatory impact
- [ ] FDA mapping needs updating
- [ ] HIPAA mapping needs updating
- [ ] 21 CFR Part 11 mapping needs updating
- [ ] IRB template needs updating

## Review Requirements

Per the [Decision Process](../../governance/DECISION_PROCESS.md):
- [ ] Editorial (1 maintainer, 7 days)
- [ ] Minor Enhancement (2 maintainers, 14 days)
- [ ] Breaking Change (all maintainers, 30 days)
